raw.subject: Good and Evil BBQ in Little Rock; Something I noticed about Good and Evil BBQ
raw.body:
Hi,

Your Little Rock page caught my eye with the new cover photo, and I loved the idea of cooking for all types of parties. That's quite a unique service!

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving potential customers searching for your hours or menu on Google instead of finding you directly. For a local favorite like Good and Evil BBQ, having a simple website could make it easier for new customers to find and visit you.

I sketched out a simple homepage idea from what you post on Facebook, featuring a menu hero, hours block, photo gallery, and map & directions so people can easily find you. Here's a preview:

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/good-and-evil-bbq-little-rock

If you'd like to discuss turning this into a full website for Good and Evil BBQ, I'd be happy to provide a simple flat fee for local businesses and schedule a quick call to discuss details.
